description_long: This is a well-loved brown stuffed toy bear with a rounded body, short limbs, and a large, pale beige patch on its belly. The bear has two round black eyes and a small black nose, giving it a simple, endearing expression. Its surface shows signs of wear, including a white patch on its left leg and a handprint mark on its back, suggesting it has been handled frequently. The ears are small and rounded, positioned symmetrically on top of the head. The stitching is visible along the sides, and the fabric appears to be a soft, textured material. The overall appearance is that of a cherished toy, possibly left behind or found in an urban park or playground.
description: A brown stuffed bear with a pale belly patch, black eyes, and visible signs of wear, including a handprint on its back and a white patch on its leg.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black eyes, nose, and large pale belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, visible stitching, and a white worn patch on the leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a handprint mark on the back and the rounded shape of the head and body.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the bear's profile, stitching, and a worn patch near the ear.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round black eyes and a small, simple black nose. There is no visible mouth, giving the bear a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
